name: sector-label-hardcoded-ko
desc: Replace the remaining CP932 hardcoded strategic sector labels that are concatenated with Korean system names in the GDI text path. This fixes mixed CP949+CP932 mojibake such as 발할라星系 / 星系内宇宙 without adding any server records.
verified: GDI trace g006-gdi-text-missionfix-20260621.json showed CP949 system name bytes followed by CP932 90af8c6e / 90af8c6e93e089469288 through the ExtTextOutA/W path; binary scan found the CP932 literals only at EXE file offsets 0x38d4c8 and 0x38d4ac.

patches.note: CP932 星系内宇宙 -> CP949 성계내우주 (same 10-byte length)
